Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 102 

IMGRTN_STUS_5YR_BAR_END_DT 

LABEL: Immigration Status Five Year Bar End Date — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: The date the five-year bar for a beneficiary ends; most recent in the calendar and the two prior years. 

SHORT NAME: IMGRTN_STUS_5YR_BAR_END_DT 

LONG NAME: IMGRTN_STUS_5YR_BAR_END_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
